decision.reason: Source-gap resolution can proceed through read-only extractors and review packets. Dictionaries and Wikipedia may enrich evidence review, but they do not authorize formal scoring or CNBE row writes.

resolution_phases.purpose: confirm the source gap is real before adding dictionary context

resolution_phases.purpose: extract etymology, definition, decomposition, and structure clues for human review
provide dictionary contexts for meaning and usage; do not derive final structure labels from definitions alone
use only after dictionary and standard evidence is insufficient; requires a streaming Unicode-keyed index before row-level use
prepare review packets and identify 8105-aligned rule-learning candidates without writing CNBE rows

source_policy.cihai: dictionary meaning and usage context for review, not direct structure authority
source_policy.hanzi_yuanliu: character-origin and decomposition clue source for review, not direct national-standard authority
source_policy.national_standards: direct evidence for standard fields when present
source_policy.wikipedia_offline: lowest-tier cross-reference only after standards and dictionaries; never direct scoring authority
